description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for accessing SupportingDocument entities in the database, including methods to find documents by user ID and loan draft ID.

classes.name: SupportingDocumentRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for SupportingDocument entity, extending JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations and custom queries.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc
methods.description: Retrieves all supporting documents for a specific user, ordered by creation date descending.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdAndLoanDraftIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc
methods.description: Retrieves all supporting documents filtered by user ID and loan draft ID, ordered by creation date descending.

methods.name: findByIdAndUserId
methods.description: Finds a supporting document by its ID and user ID, returning an optional result.
